rulings.Case Title: VALERIE LEE VS. MICHAEL W. SPENCER et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss First Amended Complaint;
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, March 21, 2014, line 4. DEFENDANT MICHAEL SPENCER'S Motion To Dismiss First Amended Complaint; DENIED. Untimely per CCP 1005. No authority is cited for the proposition that motion to dismiss lies on the grounds stated in the Notice. (1:22-25). = (501/REQ)
